subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones! Hearken unto My call, and arise for the triumph of My Cause and the exaltation of My Word, whereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احبائی ان استمعوا ندائی و قوموا علی نصره امری و ارتفاع کلمتی التی بها
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @suffering and imprisonment, @wisdom [hikmat], @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
